_README: Parties (acquirers / targets / other parties) that are the same real-world entity recorded under more than one name or ABN. Each entry in `groups` is { "id": "<slug>", "canonical_name": "<display name>", "members": [ { "name": "...", "identifier": "..." }, ... ] }. A party on a merger is matched to a group when its ABN matches a member's `identifier` OR its (normalised) name matches a member's `name` — see scripts/party_matching.py. On the merger detail page each matched party becomes a link to the mergers list filtered by the group's canonical_name. New candidate groups are suggested daily by scripts/detect_related_parties.py via a pull request.
